requirements_met: Publisher function accepting BasePayload and publishing MemoryEpisodeV1
content_format='json' and payload_type routing for RelayService
Body round-trip serialization through payload registry
Deterministic episode_id from natural_key for idempotent publish
Complete test suite with all required test cases
validation_results.test_output_summary: 5 tests passed: test_episode_is_json_with_payload_type, test_body_round_trips_through_registry, test_episode_id_deterministic_for_natural_key, test_no_network_calls_during_publish, test_source_ref_preserved. All assertions verified independently by Coach.
validation_results.code_quality: All modified files pass ruff check with zero errors
edge_cases_covered: Content format and payload type routing structure

criteria_verification.notes: Independent tests confirm publish_episode(payload: BasePayload) exists and publishes MemoryEpisodeV1 to MEMORY stream. Test test_episode_is_json_with_payload_type passed.
Independent tests confirm episode.content_format == 'json' and episode.payload_type == payload.payload_type. Test test_episode_is_json_with_payload_type asserts both fields correctly.
Independent test test_body_round_trips_through_registry confirms canonical JSON serialization and successful reconstruction via get_model_for_type(episode.payload_type)(**json.loads(episode.body)).
Independent tests confirm source_ref preservation (test_source_ref_preserved) and deterministic episode_id from natural_key (test_episode_id_deterministic_for_natural_key). Both tests passed.
Independent test test_no_network_calls_during_publish confirms no LLM/cloud/network calls during publish operation.
tests/unit/reindex/test_publisher.py contains all required assertions: content_format, payload_type, body round-trip, deterministic episode_id. All 5 tests passed independently.
Quality gates confirm all modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors.

rationale: All 7 acceptance criteria verified by deterministic evidence. Independent test verification passed 5/5 tests covering all required assertions. All quality gates passed (tests, coverage, plan audit). Honesty discrepancies are advisory-level warnings about orchestrator files in the report, not fabrications. One BDD scenario is pending but represents future integration testing beyond this task's unit-level scope - the task correctly implements the publisher structure that enables RelayService routing (AC-002), which is verified by unit tests.
